details: The agent successfully completed both steps: (1) navigated to https://httpbin.org/status/404 and correctly reported the HTTP 404 error with Chrome's error page showing 'This httpbin.org page can't be found' and 'HTTP ERROR 404', and (2) navigated to https://httpbin.org/html and correctly reported the page content including the 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick' heading and the Moby-Dick excerpt. The agent used actual browser automation tools and provided accurate, complete results for both steps.
